case_number: criminal bail application at some length does not

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. B. A. No.2987 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For orders on M.A. No.2363/2025 2. For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 17.04.2025 Mr. Sarfraz Ali Mangi, Special Prosecutor ANF ------------------------------------ Mr. Muhammad Nawaz Kubar, advocate, holding brief on behalf of Mr. Imtiaz Ali Jatoi, counsel for applicant, who is stated to be busy before another Bench, after arguing the instant criminal bail application at some length does not press the same and seeks direction to the trial Court to decide the case of the applicant preferably within a period of three months. Special Prosecutor ANF has recorded no objection for such proposal. In view of above, instant criminal bail application is dismissed as not pressed on merits, with direction to the trial Court to decide the case of the applicant preferably within a period of three months. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
